title: INtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Credit card transfer partners: Guide to transferring points and miles to airlines and hotels
items.description: A look at the airline and hotel loyalty programs that partner with credit card issuers like American Express, Chase, Bilt, Citi, Capital One and Wells...

items.title: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card review: A card for all Hilton fans
items.description: The Hilton Amex Aspire offers tons of benefits, from bonus points on Hilton stays to complimentary Diamond status. Here's what you need to know to app...

items.title: This IHG hotel in Turks & Caicos is now open near a stunning turquoise-water beach
items.description: The Hotel Indigo Turks & Caicos Grace Bay is now open near Grace Bay Beach, and you can book it with IHG One Rewards points.

items.title: The 5 best places to see the 2026 total solar eclipse
items.description: On Aug. 12, 2026, a rare total solar eclipse will travel over Eastern Greenland, Western Iceland, Northern Spain and the Balearic Islands.

items.title: American and United face new challenge in O’Hare turf war: the FAA
items.description: American Airlines and United Airlines will need to prune their schedules at Chicago's O'Hare International Airport following FAA intervention.
